prompt: Monorepo of independent apps — read AGENTS.md first. `pnpm install` is the whole setup for 7 of the 9 apps; apps/kyh and apps/policingice want a `.env` (copy each app's .env.example). Run `pnpm verify` before committing. policingice's database is REMOTE PRODUCTION — never run its db:push, db:studio or anything in apps/policingice/scripts.
